chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI 1.A. No.70 of 2020 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on office objection /reply at “A” 2. For orders on CMA No.2800/2020 (Ex/A). 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No.2801/2020 (Stay) -------------------------------------------------------------- 23.12.2020. Mr. Saalim Salam Ansari, advocate for the appellants. M/s. Fahim Iqbal and Muhammad Azhar Faridi, advocates for respondent No.1. Mr. Qutubuddin, advocate for respondent No.2. >><< By consent of all the learned counsel present before us, the instant appeal is disposed of in terms of undertaking reflected in the order dated 11.12.2020 whereby the appellant would hand over possession of property bearing House/Bungalow No.67/II, 3rd Street, Ground Plus One Floor, Khayaban-e-Badban, Phase-V, DHA, Karachi within thirty days’ time, which would expire on 9th January 2021. Upon violation of this order, the Banking Court would take immediate steps to hand over possession to the auction purchaser in accordance with law. The appeal stands disposed of in the above terms along the listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE
